title: Draw the flow
question: How does this process actually flow, end to end?
lede: One drawing, named paths, and the same flow in words below it.
inputs: the code or documents the flow was traced from

flow.ariaLabel: Tag-filter navigation flow with normal, decision, failure, and recovery paths
flow.caption: Every navigation walks left to right; the branch at “tag known?” separates the normal render from the empty-state path, and “clear filter” is the recovery route back to the full catalog.

pathViews.label: Normal path
steps: each step of the happy path, in words

pathViews.label: The decision
steps: what the branch decides and on what evidence

pathViews.label: Failure path
steps: what actually happens when it goes wrong

pathViews.label: Recovery path
steps: how the system or user gets back to good

options.label: The flow is accurate
options.consequence: This drawing and its textual equivalent become the recorded shared understanding of the navigation.

options.label: Needs correction
options.consequence: Name what is wrong or missing in the rationale; the flow is redrawn before anything is recorded.

options.label: Wrong question
options.consequence: The flow answers a different question than the one that matters; scope is restated before redrawing.

recommendation.reason: Every node and edge was walked against src/app.mjs at the recorded revision.

unresolved: anything the flow deliberately leaves open
